title: A Secret Between Girls
overview: High school girl Yuma finds herself going further with her long-time friend Hotaru than she does with her boyfriend when Hotaru offers to help her "practice" for her relationship.

title: Are Those Two...
overview: Yuma is uncomfortable when her boyfriend Takeda asks her to stay the night and Hotaru continues to escalate their "practice."

title: Shall We Practice Again?
overview: Both couples go on an unsupervised snowboarding trip. What will their sleeping arrangements be?

title: ...I'm Cheating, Too?
overview: Things get awkward when the girls room with the guys on the second night of the snowboarding trip, and Yuma hears an unsettling rumor.

title: I'm So Fed Up With Myself...
overview: Yuma confronts Fujiwara over Hotaru's black eye and the rumors.

title: Did You Think I Was Going to Kiss You?
overview: Yuma and Takeda take some time off, and Fujiwara reveals that he knows about Yuma and Hotaru's "practice."

title: We'll Always Be Best Friends, Right?
overview: Yuma is more confused about her feelings than ever. Hotaru talks to Takeda to cover for Yuma.

title: Uncontrollable Feelings
overview: Yuma finds out about Hotaru's part-time job, and she's less than thrilled about it.

title: Give Me Your Cold
overview: Against her better judgment, Yuma gets a job at Hotaru's workplace. But with cram school and her relationship problems to deal with too, can she keep it up?

title: What Exactly Is Our Relationship?
overview: Yuma and Hotaru have started fooling around again. Hotaru reflects on the deal she and Fujiwara made.

title: Thanks, And I'm Sorry
overview: After Yuma and Takeda have a heart-to-heart talk, Yuma starts to accept her true feelings for Hotaru. But how will Hotaru respond?

title: Why Did It Take Me This Long to Realize?
overview: Yuma confronts Hotaru over her relationship with Fujiwara. Can she convince Hotaru to leave her abusive relationship?
